name: project-exercise-38
description: - **Topic Covered:** `Middleware` in Express.js - **Description:** Create an Express.js application that uses middleware to log request details (`URL`, `HTTP` `method`, and `timestamp`) for every request. Implement custom error-handling middleware to return a user-friendly message for invalid routes or errors. - **Skills Covered:**     - `Application-level` middleware     - Request `logging` and `debugging`     - Error handling in `Express.js`.
